title: Prompt Lifecycle, Monitoring, and Production Capstone · Production Prompt Mission
summary: A cross-functional AI enablement team. The team needs versioned prompts, evals, release gates, and provider-specific operating guides. Planned artifact: Deliver Claude and Codex Prompt Production Portfolio with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Provide Claude Code repository guidance, verification commands, permissions, and durable project context.
Place recurring build, test, lint, review, and boundary guidance in the nearest applicable AGENTS.md.
Block prompt releases on material deterministic, rubric, safety, or human-review regressions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

steps.title: Commit to the mission model
steps.instruction:
Use a changed project case derived from this module: prompt production capstone. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Use a changed project case derived from this module: prompt production capstone. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. What must be established before implementation?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for provide claude code repository guidance, verification commands, permissions, and durable project context.

content.text: Provide Claude Code repository guidance, verification commands, permissions, and durable project context. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Preserve authority, safety, accessibility, traceability, and stakeholder consequences alongside technical correctness.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: prompt production capstone. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Claude Code Context, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a production prompt portfolio and release gate.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Claude Code needs only a feature request to modify any repository safely. This fails the Claude Code Context contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: Anthropic Agent Evaluation Guidance (2026) — Controls multi-turn and tool-using evaluation design for agentic prompts.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Provide Claude Code repository guidance, verification commands, permissions, and durable project context.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-portfolio-defense-1dimst
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]

options.text: Reject the unsupported conclusion, name the violated Portfolio Defense condition, repair the responsible layer, and rerun the boundary trace.

steps.title: Defend the stakeholder delivery
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Portfolio Defense applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Defend prompt design choices with evidence across Claude, Codex, changed cases, and limitations.
